amendment.adoption_date.label: FIRST: The amendment was adopted on (date)

amendment.approval_method.label: FIRST: duly approved as follows ('X' one box only): by the incorporators / by the board of directors / by the shareholders
amendment.approval_method.binding_source: radio group 'duly'; kid on-states by geometry+text: y=392.1 duly1='by the incorporators'; y=404.3 duly2='by the board of directors'; y=416.4 duly3='by the shareholders'. Schema order matches form order.

amendment.benefit_corp_change.label: SECOND: Benefit Corporation status change ('X' one): become (designation §1804) / modify_public_benefit (add/amend/delete §1811.4) / terminate (§1805)
amendment.benefit_corp_change.binding_source: radio group 'bc'; kid on-states by geometry+text: y=476.5 Yes='designation as a benefit corporation pursuant to 13-C MRSA 1804'=become; y=489.6 bc2='add, amend or delete identification of a specific public benefit ... 1811.4'=modify_public_benefit; y=513.2 bc3='termination as a benefit corporation pursuant to 13-C MRSA 1805'=terminate.

amendment.benefit_corp_public_benefit_ex.label: SECOND: ...specific public benefit ... as set forth in Exhibit __

amendment.share_exchange_exhibit_letter.label: THIRD: ...are set forth in Exhibit __, or as follows

amendment.effective_date.label: FOURTH: The effective date of the amendment (if other than the date of filing) is ___
